name: Lob
description: Monitor Lob direct mail platform for address verification and postal compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Lob at https://dashboard.lob.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your Live API key
4. Base64 encode 'live_api_key:' (with trailing colon, no password)
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'live_api_key:' (with trailing colon). Found in Lob Dashboard → Settings → API Keys. Command: echo -n 'live_xxxx:' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Lob API key access is active for direct mail operations
